item.title: 2026-06-18 Fed重估与AI贸易韧性
item.description:
Fed维持利率但上修通胀和政策利率路径，美国零售仍有韧性；亚洲AI贸易和PBOC人民币工具给增长与金融基础设施留下结构性线索。
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-18-fed-repricing-ai-trade-resilience.md
item.content:encoded:
Fed维持利率但上修通胀和政策利率路径，美国零售仍有韧性；亚洲AI贸易和PBOC人民币工具给增长与金融基础设施留下结构性线索。
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-18-fed-repricing-ai-trade-resilience.md
item.itunes:summary: Fed维持利率但上修通胀和政策利率路径，美国零售仍有韧性；亚洲AI贸易和PBOC人民币工具给增长与金融基础设施留下结构性线索。
item.itunes:keywords: Fed, higher for longer, retail sales, AI trade, BOJ, RMB, Hong Kong, duration

item.title: 2026-06-16 油价降温与融资窗口重排
item.description:
美伊霍尔木兹协议压低油价并推升全球risk-on，但能源恢复速度、本周FOMC、Nvidia债券需求、Fox-Roku M&A和香港五年规划共同决定duration与融资窗口能否真正打开。
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-16-oil-duration-risk-budget.md
item.content:encoded:
美伊霍尔木兹协议压低油价并推升全球risk-on，但能源恢复速度、本周FOMC、Nvidia债券需求、Fox-Roku M&A和香港五年规划共同决定duration与融资窗口能否真正打开。
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-16-oil-duration-risk-budget.md
item.itunes:summary: 美伊霍尔木兹协议压低油价并推升全球risk-on，但能源恢复速度、本周FOMC、Nvidia债券需求、Fox-Roku M&A和香港五年规划共同决定duration与融资窗口能否真正打开。
item.itunes:keywords: oil, Hormuz, Fed, duration, Nvidia, AI capex, credit, Fox, Roku, M&A, Hong Kong

item.title: 2026-06-14 油价松动与信用冷暖
item.description:
油价因美伊协议希望回落，SpaceX首日交易验证ECM需求；但美国通胀、下周FOMC和中国信用结构仍约束duration与风险偏好。
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-14-oil-spacex-china-credit.md
item.content:encoded:
油价因美伊协议希望回落，SpaceX首日交易验证ECM需求；但美国通胀、下周FOMC和中国信用结构仍约束duration与风险偏好。
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-14-oil-spacex-china-credit.md
item.itunes:summary: 油价因美伊协议希望回落，SpaceX首日交易验证ECM需求；但美国通胀、下周FOMC和中国信用结构仍约束duration与风险偏好。
item.itunes:keywords: oil, Iran, SpaceX, ECM, FOMC, CPI, China credit, AI supply chain

item.title: 2026-06-12 油价喘息与SpaceX定价
item.description:
伊朗风险降温带动美股和小盘反弹，油价回落压低美债收益率；但美国PPI和ECB加息限制rate relief，SpaceX创纪录IPO和Adobe盘后反应继续检验AI与ECM风险预算。
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-12-iran-ppi-spacex-ipo.md
item.content:encoded:
伊朗风险降温带动美股和小盘反弹，油价回落压低美债收益率；但美国PPI和ECB加息限制rate relief，SpaceX创纪录IPO和Adobe盘后反应继续检验AI与ECM风险预算。
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-12-iran-ppi-spacex-ipo.md
item.itunes:summary: 伊朗风险降温带动美股和小盘反弹，油价回落压低美债收益率；但美国PPI和ECB加息限制rate relief，SpaceX创纪录IPO和Adobe盘后反应继续检验AI与ECM风险预算。
item.itunes:keywords: Iran, PPI, ECB, SpaceX IPO, Adobe, oil, risk-on, ECM

item.title: 2026-06-11 通胀回潮与AI资金审计
item.description:
美国CPI和油价把市场拉回通胀与资金成本，Oracle盘后显示AI infrastructure订单强但更耗现金，中国PPI和日欧央行压力提示全球duration重新定价。
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-11-cpi-oil-oracle-rate-reset.md
item.content:encoded:
美国CPI和油价把市场拉回通胀与资金成本，Oracle盘后显示AI infrastructure订单强但更耗现金，中国PPI和日欧央行压力提示全球duration重新定价。
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-11-cpi-oil-oracle-rate-reset.md
item.itunes:summary: 美国CPI和油价把市场拉回通胀与资金成本，Oracle盘后显示AI infrastructure订单强但更耗现金，中国PPI和日欧央行压力提示全球duration重新定价。
item.itunes:keywords: CPI, oil, Oracle, AI capex, China PPI, ECB, BOJ, duration

item.title: 2026-06-10 技术股降温与真实资金
item.description:
美股技术股回撤但市场 breadth 未崩，中国贸易数据支撑亚洲供应链，印尼加息守汇率，GSK-Nuvalent 现金并购显示 healthcare M&A 仍有买方资金。
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-10-us-tech-china-trade-indonesia-ma.md
item.content:encoded:
美股技术股回撤但市场 breadth 未崩，中国贸易数据支撑亚洲供应链，印尼加息守汇率，GSK-Nuvalent 现金并购显示 healthcare M&A 仍有买方资金。
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-10-us-tech-china-trade-indonesia-ma.md
item.itunes:summary: 美股技术股回撤但市场 breadth 未崩，中国贸易数据支撑亚洲供应链，印尼加息守汇率，GSK-Nuvalent 现金并购显示 healthcare M&A 仍有买方资金。
item.itunes:keywords: US equities, CPI, China trade, Indonesia rupiah, healthcare M&A, GSK, Nuvalent

item.title: 2026-06-08 资金成本先行
item.description:
强非农、AI capex 融资、OPEC+ 小幅增产与香港账户审查共同指向资金成本和流动性通道重估。

item.description:
强非农后的二次定价把市场焦点转向资金成本、AI capex 融资、SpaceX 订单簿和香港账户审查。

item.title: Hot Payrolls, AI Reset, and HK Flow Risk
item.description:
A strong U.S. jobs report pushed rates higher and forced a reset in crowded AI and semiconductor risk, while oil relief, Hong Kong account scrutiny, and SpaceX index rules shaped the flow backdrop.
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-06-hot-payrolls-ai-hk-flow-risk.md
item.content:encoded:
A strong U.S. jobs report pushed rates higher and forced a reset in crowded AI and semiconductor risk, while oil relief, Hong Kong account scrutiny, and SpaceX index rules shaped the flow backdrop.
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-06-hot-payrolls-ai-hk-flow-risk.md
item.itunes:summary: A strong U.S. jobs report pushed rates higher and forced a reset in crowded AI and semiconductor risk, while oil relief, Hong Kong account scrutiny, and SpaceX index rules shaped the flow backdrop.
item.itunes:keywords: jobs, rates, AI capex, semiconductors, Hong Kong, oil, SpaceX IPO

item.title: Conditional Risk-On, AI Discipline, and HK Flow Risk
item.description:
Oil and yields eased enough to broaden risk appetite, but Broadcom's selloff, AI-linked layoffs, and Hong Kong financial-share pressure kept the rally conditional.
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-05-conditional-risk-on-ai-hk-flows.md
item.content:encoded:
Oil and yields eased enough to broaden risk appetite, but Broadcom's selloff, AI-linked layoffs, and Hong Kong financial-share pressure kept the rally conditional.
Show notes: https://Han7712.github.io/morning-news/show_notes/2026-06-05-conditional-risk-on-ai-hk-flows.md
item.itunes:summary: Oil and yields eased enough to broaden risk appetite, but Broadcom's selloff, AI-linked layoffs, and Hong Kong financial-share pressure kept the rally conditional.
item.itunes:keywords: risk-on, Broadcom, AI capex, labor market, Hong Kong financials, capital controls
